series_metadata.series_description: Payroll deduction forms allow the customer to automatically withdraw money from his paycheck and deposit it into his account with the Ohio Tuition Trust. Confidential - Revised Code 3334.11.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Imaged files are kept permanently ; Paper: Image then destroy provided image verified for quality and completeness. Older records that have not been imaged will be retained for the life of the contract, Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
